introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu ku barayaa sida qof loo salaamo, la isu baro, magaca iyo xaaladda loo weydiiyo, qof kale loo baro, iyo wada sheekeysi fudud si edeb leh loo bilaabo loona dhammeeyo.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar salaamaha lagu bilaabo laguna dhammeeyo kulan, iyo farqiga Good evening iyo Good night.
learningObjectives: Isticmaal ugu yaraan shan salaamood oo sax ah.
Kala saar Good evening iyo Good night.
Dooro salaanta ku habboon waqtiga maalinta.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Hello waa salaam guud oo rasmi iyo caadi labadaba ku habboon.
Hi waxaa badanaa lala isticmaalaa saaxiib ama qof aad taqaan.
Waxaa la isticmaalaa subaxdii.
Waxaa la isticmaalaa duhurka kadib ilaa fiidkii.
Waxaa lagu salaamaa qof fiidkii marka la kulmayo.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha u isticmaalin markaad seexanaysid; markaas Good night ayaa sax ah.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa la yiraahdaa marka la kala tagayo habeenkii ama la seexanayo.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Good night ma aha salaanta bilowga fiidka.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Goodbye waa qaab cad oo lagu soo gabagabeeyo kulanka.

vocabulary.somaliMeaning: Goor dambe ayaan is arki doonnaa
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Goor dambe ayaan iskuulka isku arki doonnaa.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa la yiraahdaa marka la filayo in mar kale la kulmo.

examples.somali: Habeen wanaagsan. Berri ayaan is arki doonnaa.

lines.speaker: Ali
lines.english: Good morning, Amina. How are you?

lines.speaker: Ali
lines.somali: Goor dambe ayaan is arki doonnaa.

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.somali: Habeen wanaagsan. Berri ayaan is arki doonnaa.

practiceExercises.question: “Hello” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Salaan”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

practiceExercises.question: ___ morning, teacher.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “Good” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Hi” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hi waxaa loola jeedaa Salaan aan rasmi badnayn.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: you / See / tomorrow
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “See you tomorrow.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: Hello, how are you?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda, mana aha turjumaad eray-eray khaldan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Subax wanaagsan, macallin.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “Good morning, teacher.”.

practiceExercises.question: Magacyada dadka waxaa English-ka lagu bilaabaa capital letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Magac qof waa proper name, sidaas darteed xarafka koowaad waa capital.

practiceExercises.question: Waxaad macallinkaaga la kulantay 8:00 subaxnimo. Maxaad oranaysaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “Good morning” ayaa ku habboon qofka iyo xaaladda lagu sheegay; xulashooyinka kale waxay noqon karaan waqti ama heer rasmi ah oo aan ku habboonayn.

practiceExercises.question: Salaan saaxiib, macallin iyo qof aad fiidkii la kulantay. Kadib ku dhammee “Goodbye” ama “See you later.”
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah oo cad u hadal. Isticmaal weedhaha casharka oo eeg qofka aad la hadlayso.

practiceExercises.question: Qor salaanta ku habboon subax, galab iyo fiid, kadib qor laba weedhood oo lagu kala tagayo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi capital letters-ka magacyada, full stop-ka jumladaha iyo question mark-ka su’aalaha.

lessons.speakingPractice: Salaan saaxiib, macallin iyo qof aad fiidkii la kulantay. Kadib ku dhammee “Goodbye” ama “See you later.”
lessons.writingPractice: Qor salaanta ku habboon subax, galab iyo fiid, kadib qor laba weedhood oo lagu kala tagayo.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay salaamaha subax, galab iyo fiid. Good evening waxaa lagu bilaabaa kulan fiidkii; Good night waxaa lagu kala tagaa ama la yiraahdaa marka la seexanayo.

quizQuestions.question: “Hello” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Salaan”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

quizQuestions.question: ___ morning, teacher.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “Good” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Hi” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Hi waxaa loola jeedaa Salaan aan rasmi badnayn.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar sida magacaaga, meesha aad ka timid, meesha aad degan tahay iyo shaqadaada si fudud loo sheego.
learningObjectives: Isku bar ugu yaraan afar jumladood.
Isticmaal I am iyo I’m si sax ah.
Ku dhammee isbarashada Nice to meet you.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Qaab cad oo magacaaga lagu sheego.
I am waxaa lagu sheegaa magaca ama xaaladda qofka.
I’m waa qaabka gaaban ee I am.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha qorin Im adigoon apostrophe isticmaalin.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa lagu sheegaa dalka ama meesha aad asal ahaan ka timid.
Waxaa lagu sheegaa meesha aad hadda degan tahay.
Student waa qof wax barta.

vocabulary.somaliMeaning: Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo, Caasha.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa la yiraahdaa marka qof markii ugu horreysay la kulmo.

vocabulary.somaliMeaning: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo, mudane.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waa qaab ka rasmi badan Nice to meet you.

grammar.titleSomali: I am iyo qaabka gaaban I’m
grammar.explanationSomali: I am waxaa loo isticmaalaa marka aad naftaada ka hadlayso. I’m waa isla macnahaas oo la soo gaabiyay.
grammar.sentenceStructure: I am/I’m + name, job, or description

positiveExamples.somali: Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha oran I is; waxaa sax ah I am.

examples.somali: Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

lines.speaker: Sahra
lines.somali: Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

lines.speaker: Omar
lines.somali: Aniguna waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

lines.speaker: Abdi
lines.english: I am Abdi. I work as a driver.
lines.somali: Waxaan ahay Cabdi. Waxaan u shaqeeyaa darawal.

lines.speaker: Hodan
lines.english: I’m Hodan. I work in the office.
lines.somali: Waxaan ahay Hodan. Waxaan ka shaqeeyaa xafiiska.

lines.speaker: Abdi
lines.somali: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

lines.speaker: Hodan
lines.somali: Aniguna aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

practiceExercises.question: “My name is…” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Magacaygu waa…”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

practiceExercises.question: My name ___ Amina.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “is” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “I am…” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: I am… waxaa loola jeedaa Waxaan ahay….

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: from / am / Somalia / I
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “I am from Somalia.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: My name is Fadumo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda, mana aha turjumaad eray-eray khaldan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Waxaan ahay arday.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “I’m a student.”.

practiceExercises.question: Magacyada dadka waxaa English-ka lagu bilaabaa capital letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Magac qof waa proper name, sidaas darteed xarafka koowaad waa capital.

practiceExercises.question: Markaad qof cusub la kulanto, weedhee ku habboon?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “Nice to meet you” ayaa ku habboon qofka iyo xaaladda lagu sheegay; xulashooyinka kale waxay noqon karaan waqti ama heer rasmi ah oo aan ku habboonayn.

practiceExercises.question: Isku bar 3 ilaa 5 jumladood: magacaaga, meesha aad ka timid, meesha aad degan tahay iyo shaqadaada ama waxbarashadaada.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah oo cad u hadal. Isticmaal weedhaha casharka oo eeg qofka aad la hadlayso.

practiceExercises.question: Qor isbarasho shan jumladood ah oo ku bilaabma “My name is…”.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi capital letters-ka magacyada, full stop-ka jumladaha iyo question mark-ka su’aalaha.

lessons.speakingPractice: Isku bar 3 ilaa 5 jumladood: magacaaga, meesha aad ka timid, meesha aad degan tahay iyo shaqadaada ama waxbarashadaada.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor isbarasho shan jumladood ah oo ku bilaabma “My name is…”.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad hadda magacaaga iyo xog kooban ku sheegi kartaa My name is…, I am… ama I’m…. Nice to meet you waxaa lagu yiraahdaa qof cusub.

quizQuestions.question: “My name is…” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Magacaygu waa…”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

quizQuestions.question: My name ___ Amina.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “is” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “I am…” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: I am… waxaa loola jeedaa Waxaan ahay….

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar su’aalaha magaca, higgaadinta iyo ku celinta, adigoo isticmaalaya qaab edeb leh.
learningObjectives: Magaca qof si edeb leh u weydii.
Weydii sida magaca loo higgaadiyo.
Isticmaal question mark dhammaadka su’aasha.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waa su’aasha caadiga ah ee magaca qof lagu weydiiyo.
What’s waa qaabka gaaban ee What is.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: May I know your name, please?
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waa qaab rasmi ah oo edeb leh.
Su’aashani mararka qaar way adkaan kartaa; qof cusub si edeb leh magaca u weydii.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha u adeegsan xaalad rasmi ah marka What is your name? ka dabacsan yahay.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: How do you spell your name?
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Spell waa in magaca xaraf-xaraf loo sheego.
Waxaa la isticmaalaa marka magaca aan si fiican loo maqal.
Please wuxuu hadalka ka dhigaa mid edeb leh.
Su’aal toos ah waxay ku dhammaataa ?.

grammar.explanationSomali: Su’aasha magaca badanaa waxay ku bilaabataa What ama How, waxayna ku dhammaataa question mark.

positiveExamples.somali: Ma ku celin kartaa taas, fadlan?

questionExamples.somali: Ma ku celin kartaa taas, fadlan?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha ka tagin is: What is your name?
Who are you? mararka qaar waxay u muuqan kartaa mid adag.

examples.somali: Ma ku celin kartaa taas, fadlan?

lines.speaker: Caller
lines.english: Can you repeat your name, please?
lines.somali: Ma ku celin kartaa magacaaga, fadlan?

practiceExercises.question: “What is your name?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Magacaa?”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

practiceExercises.question: What ___ your name?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “is” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “What’s your name?” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: What’s your name? waxaa loola jeedaa Magacaa?.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: your / spell / do / name / How / you
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: How do you spell your name?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “How do you spell your name?”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: What is your name?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda, mana aha turjumaad eray-eray khaldan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Magacaygu waa Cumar.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “My name is Omar.”.

practiceExercises.question: Magacyada dadka waxaa English-ka lagu bilaabaa capital letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Magac qof waa proper name, sidaas darteed xarafka koowaad waa capital.

practiceExercises.question: Maamulaha ayaad si edeb leh magaciisa u weydiinaysaa. Kee ugu habboon?
options: May I know your name, please?
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: May I know your name, please?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “May I know your name, please?” ayaa ku habboon qofka iyo xaaladda lagu sheegay; xulashooyinka kale waxay noqon karaan waqti ama heer rasmi ah oo aan ku habboonayn.

practiceExercises.question: Qof weydii magaciisa si edeb leh, weydii sida loo higgaadiyo, kadib ka codso inuu hal mar ku celiyo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah oo cad u hadal. Isticmaal weedhaha casharka oo eeg qofka aad la hadlayso.

practiceExercises.question: Qor wada sheekeysi afar sadar ah oo laba qof magacyadooda isku weydiinayaan.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi capital letters-ka magacyada, full stop-ka jumladaha iyo question mark-ka su’aalaha.

lessons.speakingPractice: Qof weydii magaciisa si edeb leh, weydii sida loo higgaadiyo, kadib ka codso inuu hal mar ku celiyo.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor wada sheekeysi afar sadar ah oo laba qof magacyadooda isku weydiinayaan.
lessons.summarySomali: What is your name? waa su’aasha ugu caansan. May I know your name? waa rasmi. Who are you? si taxaddar leh u isticmaal.

quizQuestions.question: “What is your name?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Magacaa?”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

quizQuestions.question: What ___ your name?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “is” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “What’s your name?” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: What’s your name? waxaa loola jeedaa Magacaa?.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar sida xaaladda qof loo weydiiyo iyo jawaabaha rasmi ah ama saaxiibtinimo.
learningObjectives: Isticmaal saddex su’aalood oo xaalad lagu weydiiyo.
Bixi ugu yaraan afar jawaabood oo kala duwan.
Kala saar jawaab rasmi ah iyo mid saaxiibtinimo.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Su’aal guud oo xaaladda qof lagu weydiiyo.
Waa qaab saaxiibtinimo.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Sidee wax walba uga yihiin shaqada?
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa lagu weydiiyaa xaaladda guud.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: You look tired. Are you okay?
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waxaad u muuqataa daallan. Ma fiican tahay?
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa la weydiiyaa marka qof laga walaaco.
Waa jawaab caadi ah oo rasmi iyo guud ah.
Waa jawaab saaxiibtinimo oo aan rasmi badnayn.
Waxaa lagu sheegaa daal.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: I am not feeling well today.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa lagu sheegaa in qofku xanuunsan yahay ama aanu fiicnayn.

grammar.explanationSomali: Am waxaa lala isticmaalaa I; is waxaa lala isticmaalaa he, she ama it; are waxaa lala isticmaalaa you.
grammar.rule: I am; he/she is; you are

positiveExamples.english: I am very well, thank you.

commonMistakesSomali: Ha oran How is you; waxaa sax ah How are you?
Ha oran I is fine; waxaa sax ah I am fine.

examples.english: I am very well, thank you.

practiceExercises.question: “How are you?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Sidee tahay?”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

practiceExercises.question: How ___ you?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “are” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “How are you doing?” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: How are you doing? waxaa loola jeedaa Sidee wax kuu yihiin?.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: fine / am / I / thank you
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “I am fine, thank you.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: How are you today?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda, mana aha turjumaad eray-eray khaldan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Aad ayaan u fiicanahay, mahadsanid.
options: I am very well, thank you.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: I am very well, thank you.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “I am very well, thank you.”.

practiceExercises.question: Magacyada dadka waxaa English-ka lagu bilaabaa capital letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Magac qof waa proper name, sidaas darteed xarafka koowaad waa capital.

practiceExercises.question: Saaxiibkaa wuxuu u muuqdaa daallan. Maxaad weydiinaysaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “Are you okay?” ayaa ku habboon qofka iyo xaaladda lagu sheegay; xulashooyinka kale waxay noqon karaan waqti ama heer rasmi ah oo aan ku habboonayn.

practiceExercises.question: Salaan qof, weydii xaaladdiisa, kadib ku jawaab saddex qaab: fine, not bad iyo tired.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah oo cad u hadal. Isticmaal weedhaha casharka oo eeg qofka aad la hadlayso.

practiceExercises.question: Qor wada sheekeysi gaaban oo qof xaaladdiisa la weydiinayo, kana jawaabayo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi capital letters-ka magacyada, full stop-ka jumladaha iyo question mark-ka su’aalaha.

lessons.speakingPractice: Salaan qof, weydii xaaladdiisa, kadib ku jawaab saddex qaab: fine, not bad iyo tired.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor wada sheekeysi gaaban oo qof xaaladdiisa la weydiinayo, kana jawaabayo.
lessons.summarySomali: How are you? waa su’aal guud. I am fine waa jawaab caadi ah; Not bad waa informal; I am not feeling well waxay sheegaysaa caafimaad xumo.

quizQuestions.question: “How are you?” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Sidee tahay?”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

quizQuestions.question: How ___ you?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “are” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “How are you doing?” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: How are you doing? waxaa loola jeedaa Sidee wax kuu yihiin?.

lessons.titleSomali: Sida dad kale la isu baro
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar sida saaxiib, qaraabo ama macallin qof kale loogu baro adigoo isticmaalaya I, you, he, she, my, your, his iyo her.
learningObjectives: Qof kale ku bar This is….
He iyo she si sax ah u kala isticmaal.
My, your, his iyo her ku muuji lahaansho.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: This is waxaa lagu bilaabaa marka qof la barayo.
Meet waxaa halkan loo isticmaalaa isbarasho.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Let me introduce you to Ahmed.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waa qaab edeb leh oo laba qof la isku baro.
He waxaa loo isticmaalaa qof lab ah.
She waxaa loo isticmaalaa qof dumar ah.
His wuxuu tilmaamayaa wax uu leeyahay qof lab ah.
Her wuxuu tilmaamayaa wax ay leedahay qof dumar ah.
Your waxaa lala isticmaalaa qofka lala hadlayo.

grammar.explanationSomali: I iyo you waxay tilmaamaan qofka hadlaya iyo qofka lala hadlayo. He waa nin, she waa haweeney. My, your, his iyo her waxay muujiyaan cidda wax leh.
commonMistakesSomali: Ha u isticmaalin he qof dumar ah.
His waa lahaanshaha nin; her waa lahaanshaha haweeney.

lines.speaker: Amina
lines.english: Ali, this is my friend Hawa.

lines.speaker: Hawa
lines.somali: Salaan. Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

lines.speaker: Ali
lines.somali: Aniguna waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

lines.speaker: Omar
lines.english: Let me introduce you to my teacher.

lines.speaker: Asha
lines.english: Pleased to meet you, Ms Maryan.
lines.somali: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo, Marwo Maryan.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.somali: Aniguna aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

practiceExercises.question: “This is my friend” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Kani waa saaxiibkay”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

practiceExercises.question: Amina is my teacher. ___ is kind.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “She” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Meet my teacher” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Meet my teacher waxaa loola jeedaa La kulan macallinkayga.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: friend / is / my / This
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “This is my friend.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: This is my friend, Abdi.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda, mana aha turjumaad eray-eray khaldan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Isagu waa arday.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “He is a student.”.

practiceExercises.question: Magacyada dadka waxaa English-ka lagu bilaabaa capital letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Magac qof waa proper name, sidaas darteed xarafka koowaad waa capital.

practiceExercises.question: Waxaad baraysaa walaalkaa Xasan. Weedhee sax ah?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “This is my brother, Hassan.” ayaa ku habboon qofka iyo xaaladda lagu sheegay; xulashooyinka kale waxay noqon karaan waqti ama heer rasmi ah oo aan ku habboonayn.

practiceExercises.question: Qof kale saaxiibkaa bar. Isticmaal This is…, He/She is… iyo His/Her name is….
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah oo cad u hadal. Isticmaal weedhaha casharka oo eeg qofka aad la hadlayso.

practiceExercises.question: Qor shan jumladood oo aad ku barayso laba qof: hal nin iyo hal haweeney.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi capital letters-ka magacyada, full stop-ka jumladaha iyo question mark-ka su’aalaha.

lessons.speakingPractice: Qof kale saaxiibkaa bar. Isticmaal This is…, He/She is… iyo His/Her name is….
lessons.writingPractice: Qor shan jumladood oo aad ku barayso laba qof: hal nin iyo hal haweeney.
lessons.summarySomali: This is… waxaa lagu baraa qof. He/his waxaa loo isticmaalaa nin; she/her waxaa loo isticmaalaa haweeney. My iyo your waxay muujiyaan lahaansho.

quizQuestions.question: “This is my friend” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Kani waa saaxiibkay”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

quizQuestions.question: Amina is my teacher. ___ is kind.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “She” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Meet my teacher” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Meet my teacher waxaa loola jeedaa La kulan macallinkayga.

lessons.titleSomali: Salaamaha rasmiga ah iyo kuwa caadiga ah
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar salaanta ku habboon saaxiib, macallin, maamule, macmiil, shaqaale iyo qof kaa weyn.
learningObjectives: Kala saar formal iyo informal greetings.
Si rasmi ah u salaam macallin ama macmiil.
Ka fogow Hey xaalad rasmi ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Good morning is a formal greeting.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Good morning waa salaam rasmi ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Formal language waxaa lala isticmaalaa xaalad shaqo ama qof aan si dhow loo aqoon.
Informal language waxaa lala isticmaalaa saaxiib iyo qof aad taqaan.
Hey aad buu u informal yahay.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha kula bilaabin maamule ama macmiil aadan aqoon.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Sir waa eray xushmad leh oo nin lala hadlo.
Madam waa eray rasmi ah oo haweeney lala hadlo.
Customer waa qof wax ka iibsanaya ganacsi.
Manager waa qof shaqo ama koox maamula.

vocabulary.somaliMeaning: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo, Marwo.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa ku habboon kulanka rasmiga ah ee ugu horreeya.

examples.somali: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo, Marwo.

practiceExercises.question: “Formal” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Rasmi”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

practiceExercises.question: Good morning, ___.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “sir” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Informal” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Informal waxaa loola jeedaa Aan rasmi ahayn/caadi.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: meet / Pleased / you / to
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “Pleased to meet you.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: Hi, my friend!
options: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo, Marwo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda, mana aha turjumaad eray-eray khaldan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Subax wanaagsan, macallin.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “Good morning, teacher.”.

practiceExercises.question: Magacyada dadka waxaa English-ka lagu bilaabaa capital letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Magac qof waa proper name, sidaas darteed xarafka koowaad waa capital.

practiceExercises.question: Waxaad markii ugu horreysay la kulantay maamule. Maxaad oranaysaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “Pleased to meet you.” ayaa ku habboon qofka iyo xaaladda lagu sheegay; xulashooyinka kale waxay noqon karaan waqti ama heer rasmi ah oo aan ku habboonayn.

practiceExercises.question: Salaan saaxiib si informal ah, kadib salaam macallin, maamule iyo macmiil si formal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah oo cad u hadal. Isticmaal weedhaha casharka oo eeg qofka aad la hadlayso.

practiceExercises.question: Samee laba liis: afar salaamood oo formal ah iyo afar salaamood oo informal ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi capital letters-ka magacyada, full stop-ka jumladaha iyo question mark-ka su’aalaha.

lessons.speakingPractice: Salaan saaxiib si informal ah, kadib salaam macallin, maamule iyo macmiil si formal ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Samee laba liis: afar salaamood oo formal ah iyo afar salaamood oo informal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Hi iyo Hey waa informal. Hello waa guud. Good morning iyo Pleased to meet you waxay ku habboon yihiin xaalad rasmi ah iyo qof markii ugu horreysay la kulmayo.

quizQuestions.question: “Formal” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Rasmi”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

quizQuestions.question: Good morning, ___.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “sir” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Informal” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Informal waxaa loola jeedaa Aan rasmi ahayn/caadi.

lessons.titleSomali: Bilaabidda iyo soo gabagabeynta wada sheekeysiga
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bar sida hadal si edeb leh loo bilaabo, loo sii wado, kadibna si dabiici ah loo soo gabagabeeyo.
learningObjectives: Wada sheekeysi ku bilow Excuse me.
Weydii qof xaaladdiisa.
Isticmaal ugu yaraan saddex weedhood oo lagu kala tago.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Excuse me, can I talk to you?
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Iga raalli ahow, ma kula hadli karaa?
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa lagu bilaabaa hadal marka qof dareenkiisa la doonayo.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Can I talk to you for a minute?
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Ma kula hadli karaa hal daqiiqo?
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waa qaab edeb leh oo wada hadal lagu bilaabo.
Waxaa lagu sii wadaa salaanta kadib.

vocabulary.englishWord: It was nice talking to you
vocabulary.somaliMeaning: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo
vocabulary.pronunciation: it woz naays too-king tu yuu
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: It was nice talking to you.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa lagu soo gabagabeeyaa wada sheekeysi si edeb leh.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Dhowaan ayaan is arki doonnaa, Caasha.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waxaa la yiraahdaa marka kulanka xiga la filayo.
Waa duco gaaban oo lagu kala tago.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Is ilaali. Dhowaan ayaan is arki doonnaa.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Waa qaab diirran oo lagu kala tago.
Waa weedh lagu dhammeeyo kulanka.

examples.english: Excuse me, can I talk to you?
examples.somali: Iga raalli ahow, ma kula hadli karaa?

examples.english: It was nice talking to you.
examples.somali: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo.

lines.somali: Iga raalli ahow. Ma kula hadli karaa?

lines.somali: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo.

lines.speaker: Hodan
lines.english: It was nice talking to you too.
lines.somali: Aniguna waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo.

options: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Iga raalli ahow”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

practiceExercises.question: Have a good ___.
options: It was nice talking to you
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “day” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Can I talk to you?” iyo macnihiisa.
options: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Can I talk to you? waxaa loola jeedaa Ma kula hadli karaa?.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: nice / talking / was / you / It / to
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: It was nice talking to you.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “It was nice talking to you.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: Excuse me, can I talk to you?
options: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo.
Iga raalli ahow, ma kula hadli karaa?
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: Iga raalli ahow, ma kula hadli karaa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda, mana aha turjumaad eray-eray khaldan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Salaan. Sidee tahay maanta?
options: It was nice talking to you.
Excuse me, can I talk to you?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “Hello. How are you today?”.

practiceExercises.question: Magacyada dadka waxaa English-ka lagu bilaabaa capital letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Magac qof waa proper name, sidaas darteed xarafka koowaad waa capital.

practiceExercises.question: Waxaad rabtaa inaad si edeb leh hadal u bilowdo. Kee sax ah?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “Excuse me.” ayaa ku habboon qofka iyo xaaladda lagu sheegay; xulashooyinka kale waxay noqon karaan waqti ama heer rasmi ah oo aan ku habboonayn.

practiceExercises.question: Bilow wada sheekeysi adigoo leh Excuse me, weydii xaaladda qofka, kadib si edeb leh u soo gabagabee.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah oo cad u hadal. Isticmaal weedhaha casharka oo eeg qofka aad la hadlayso.

practiceExercises.question: Qor wada sheekeysi lix sadar ah oo leh bilow, salaam, su’aal iyo dhammaad.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi capital letters-ka magacyada, full stop-ka jumladaha iyo question mark-ka su’aalaha.

lessons.speakingPractice: Bilow wada sheekeysi adigoo leh Excuse me, weydii xaaladda qofka, kadib si edeb leh u soo gabagabee.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor wada sheekeysi lix sadar ah oo leh bilow, salaam, su’aal iyo dhammaad.
lessons.summarySomali: Excuse me ayaa si edeb leh hadal u bilaaba. It was nice talking to you, Have a good day, Take care iyo Goodbye ayaa si dabiici ah u soo gabagabeeya.

quizQuestions.question: “Excuse me” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
options: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Iga raalli ahow”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

quizQuestions.question: Have a good ___.
options: It was nice talking to you
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “day” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Can I talk to you?” iyo macnihiisa.
options: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Can I talk to you? waxaa loola jeedaa Ma kula hadli karaa?.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib u eeg salaamaha, isbarashada, su’aalaha magaca, xaaladda qofka, baridda dad kale iyo bilaabidda ama dhammeystirka wada sheekeysiga.
learningObjectives: Samee wada sheekeysi A1 oo dhammeystiran.
Sax u isticmaal am, is, are, he, she, my, his iyo her.
Kala saar formal iyo informal language.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Greeting waa weedh lagu bilaabo kulan.
Introduction waa marka aad sheegto qofka aad tahay ama qof kale barato.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Use formal English with a customer.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Macmiil kula hadal English rasmi ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Formal waa hadal xushmad iyo nidaam leh.
Informal waxaa lala isticmaalaa dad aad taqaan.
Introduce waa isbarid ama laba qof isku barid.
I, you, he iyo she waxay beddelaan magaca qofka.
My, your, his iyo her waxay sheegaan cidda wax leh.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Wada sheekeysiga si edeb leh u dhammee.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Conversation waa hadal ay laba qof ama ka badan wadaagaan.

examples.english: Good morning. My name is Ali.
This is my friend. Her name is Hawa.
examples.somali: Tani waa saaxiibadday. Magaceedu waa Xaawo.

examples.english: It was nice talking to you. Goodbye.
examples.somali: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo. Nabadgelyo.

lines.english: Good morning. My name is Ali.

lines.somali: Aniguna aad ayaan ugu faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.

lines.speaker: Amina
lines.somali: Dhowaan ayaan is arki doonnaa. Nabadgelyo.

practiceExercises.question: “Greeting” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Salaan”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

practiceExercises.question: Her name ___ Hawa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “is” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi “Introduction” iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Introduction waxaa loola jeedaa Isbarasho.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: name / your / is / What
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “What is your name?”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: Good morning. My name is Ali.
options: Tani waa saaxiibadday. Magaceedu waa Xaawo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda, mana aha turjumaad eray-eray khaldan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Magacaa, fadlan?
options: Good morning. My name is Ali.
This is my friend. Her name is Hawa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ah waa “What is your name, please?”.

practiceExercises.question: Magacyada dadka waxaa English-ka lagu bilaabaa capital letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Magac qof waa proper name, sidaas darteed xarafka koowaad waa capital.

practiceExercises.question: Macmiil cusub ayaad subaxdii la kulantay. Kee ku habboon?
options: Good morning. Pleased to meet you.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: Good morning. Pleased to meet you.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: “Good morning. Pleased to meet you.” ayaa ku habboon qofka iyo xaaladda lagu sheegay; xulashooyinka kale waxay noqon karaan waqti ama heer rasmi ah oo aan ku habboonayn.

practiceExercises.question: Samee wada sheekeysi dhammeystiran: salaam, isbaro, magaca weydii, xaaladda weydii, qof kale bar, kadib soo gabagabee.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si tartiib ah oo cad u hadal. Isticmaal weedhaha casharka oo eeg qofka aad la hadlayso.

practiceExercises.question: Qor wada sheekeysi siddeed sadar ah oo laba qof markii ugu horreysay kulmayaan.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Hubi capital letters-ka magacyada, full stop-ka jumladaha iyo question mark-ka su’aalaha.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro qaabka ugu edeb badan ee magac lagu weydiiyo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Please wuxuu su’aasha ka dhigaa mid edeb leh; qaababka kale way adkaan karaan ama naxwe ahaan way khaldan yihiin.

practiceExercises.question: This is Amina. ___ is my teacher.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Amina waa qof dumar ah, sidaas darteed pronoun-ka saxda ahi waa she.

practiceExercises.question: Weedhee ayaa si wanaagsan wada sheekeysi u soo gabagabaynaysa?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: See you soon waxaa la yiraahdaa marka la kala tagayo.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: “Magacaygu waa Sahra.”
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: My waxaa loo isticmaalaa wax aniga i leeyahay; halkan waa magacayga.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: “It was nice talking to you.”
options: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: Waan ku farxay inaan kula hadlo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Weedhan waxaa si edeb leh loo adeegsadaa dhammaadka wada sheekeysiga.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee wada sheekeysi dhammeystiran: salaam, isbaro, magaca weydii, xaaladda weydii, qof kale bar, kadib soo gabagabee.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor wada sheekeysi siddeed sadar ah oo laba qof markii ugu horreysay kulmayaan.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad dib u eegtay dhammaan Unit 2. Hadda waxaad salaami kartaa qof, isbari kartaa, magac iyo xaalad weydiin kartaa, qof kale bari kartaa, wada sheekeysina si edeb leh u bilaabi oo u dhammeystiri kartaa.

quizQuestions.question: “Greeting” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Macnaha saxda ahi waa “Salaan”. Xulashooyinka kale waxay leeyihiin macnayaal kale.

quizQuestions.question: Her name ___ Hawa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: “is” ayaa qaabka jumladda iyo xaaladda ku habboon.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi “Introduction” iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Introduction waxaa loola jeedaa Isbarasho.

unitQuiz.question: Salaantee ku habboon 8:00 subaxnimo?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Good morning waxaa la isticmaalaa subaxdii.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa lagu yiraahdaa marka la seexanayo?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Good night waxaa la yiraahdaa marka la kala tagayo habeenkii ama la seexanayo.

unitQuiz.question: “See you later” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
options: Goor dambe ayaan is arki doonnaa
unitQuiz.correctAnswer: Goor dambe ayaan is arki doonnaa
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Weedhu waxay muujinaysaa in mar kale la kulmi doono.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa formal ah?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Pleased to meet you waa qaab rasmi ah oo xushmad leh.

unitQuiz.question: “Take care” waxaa la yiraahdaa marka…
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Take care waa weedh diirran oo lagu soo gabagabeeyo kulanka.

unitQuiz.question: I ___ a student.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: I waxaa la socda am.

unitQuiz.question: What ___ your name?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Qaabka saxda ahi waa What is your name?

unitQuiz.question: She ___ my teacher.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: She waxaa la socda is.

unitQuiz.question: Amina waa haweeney. ___ name is Amina.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Her waxaa loo isticmaalaa lahaanshaha qof dumar ah.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa contraction sax ah?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: I’m waa qaabka saxda ah ee I am oo apostrophe leh.

unitQuiz.question: A: Good morning. B: ___
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Salaanta waxaa si dabiici ah loogu jawaabaa isla salaanta ku habboon waqtiga.

unitQuiz.question: A: What is your name? B: ___
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Su’aashu magac ayay weydiinaysaa, sidaas darteed magaca ayaa lagu jawaabaa.

unitQuiz.question: A: How are you? B: ___
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: How are you? waxaa looga jawaabaa xaaladda qofka.

unitQuiz.question: A: It was nice talking to you. B: ___
options: Nice talking to you too. Goodbye.
unitQuiz.correctAnswer: Nice talking to you too. Goodbye.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Tani waa jawaab ku habboon dhammaadka wada sheekeysiga.

unitQuiz.question: Turjun: “Nice to meet you.”
options: Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.
unitQuiz.correctAnswer: Waan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula kulmo.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Weedhan waxaa la yiraahdaa marka qof cusub lala kulmo.

unitQuiz.question: Turjun: “Are you okay?”
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Are you okay? waxay weydiinaysaa xaaladda qofka.

unitQuiz.question: Turjun: “This is my friend.”
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: This is my friend waxaa lagu baraa saaxiib.

unitQuiz.question: U beddel English: “Magacaygu waa Sahra.”
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: My name is… ayaa lagu sheegaa magacaaga.

unitQuiz.question: U beddel English: “Sidee tahay?”
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: How are you? waa su’aasha xaaladda qofka.

unitQuiz.question: U beddel English: “Maalin wanaagsan.”
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Have a good day waxaa loo adeegsadaa duco ahaan marka la kala tagayo.
